meta.title: AI Workflows Market Pulse
meta.refreshNote: Daily trend scan — what's hot, cooling, and stable.

items.title: Market Pulse: Document OCR forms
items.summary: Cyber cafés and consultants still pay for time saved.
items.proof: Rising: WhatsApp automation, Owner dashboards, Vertical SaaS landing · Cooling: Static brochure sites, AI agent chat only
items.body: Trending up: WhatsApp automation, Owner dashboards, Vertical SaaS landing. Cooling: Static brochure sites, AI agent chat only. Stable niches still pay when tied to real workflows.

items.title: WhatsApp AI Bots — Rising Fast in India
items.summary: Restaurants and shops want order + FAQ automation inside WhatsApp. Demand up; generic chatbots without local language support are cooling off.
items.proof: Live client demos + Meta Business API adoption in India SMB segment
items.body: Trending: bilingual button flows, menu carts, staff handoff, payment links. Not trending: generic English-only bots with no CRM handoff. Action: pair bot + owner dashboard.

items.title: Static Brochure Sites — Cooling
items.summary: Plain 5-page websites without WhatsApp, forms, or analytics are harder to sell. Buyers want proof of leads and automation.
items.proof: Enquiry patterns from 2026 demo calls — owners ask for dashboards, not just design
items.body: Falling: design-only sites with no CTA tracking. Rising: landing + waitlist + WhatsApp + simple owner metrics. Package websites with one measurable outcome.

items.title: Document OCR + Form Fill — Stable Niche
items.summary: Cyber cafés, consultants, and small offices still pay for time saved on repetitive forms. Accuracy and privacy matter more than flashy UI.
items.body: Stable demand in document-heavy workflows. Winners: scan → extract → review → save customer. Losers: black-box auto-submit without staff review.

items.title: Owner Dashboards — Rising for Local Ops
items.summary: Single-screen views for orders, leads, and staff tasks beat scattered spreadsheets for restaurants, distributors, and coaching centers.
items.proof: Mirch app demo kitchen + owner panels in production use
items.body: Trending metrics: today's orders, pending tasks, response time, repeat customers. Avoid 20-chart dashboards nobody opens daily.
